description: Structured snapshot of active sorry / axiom obligations. Used by agents to quickly identify the current proof target and dependencies.
maintenance: Update when adding/removing sorrys or axioms. Progress milestones belong to sorry-cards/{symbol}.md. Detailed history: git log.
updated: 2026-04-24 (Phase B: Skeleton 完了。Layer A/B の公開 API を axiom で scaffold。axiom = 181, sorry = 0, warning = 0。新構造: Shape/{Types,GameConfig,Arbitrary,Notation,Internal/{Parse,Serialize}} / Kernel/{BFS,Bond,Transform,Internal/{BFSImpl,BondImpl,Rotate180Lemmas}} / Wires/{Signal,Gates,Elements} / Operations/{Common,HalfDestroyer,Cutter,Swapper,Rotator,Painter,ColorMixer,CrystalGenerator,Stacker,PinPusher,Gravity,Shatter,Settled} / Machine。次アクションは Phase C: Layer A 脱 axiom 化。詳細は docs/plans/layer-ab-rewrite-plan.md。)

axioms.note: 全 axiom は Phase B Skeleton で導入された公開 API 宣言。個別追跡は省略し、Phase C/D で脱 axiom 化する際に sorry-cards を新設する。
